description: Mobile techniques used by SameCoin, ATT&CK software S9030 (v1.0)
name: SameCoin (S9030)

techniques.comment: [SameCoin](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9030) can use `libexampleone.so` to fill selected files with zeros and then deletes them from the file system.(Citation: Check Point Wirte NOV 2024)
[SameCoin](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9030) can use libexampleone.so to list files to be deleted.(Citation: Check Point Wirte NOV 2024)
